rationale: Educ. Code §38.057 governs school-based health center referrals and consent. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b)homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The staff of a school-based health center and the person whose consent is obtained under Section 38.053 shall jointly identify any health-related concerns of a student
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict possible.
